latest_8k.name: Other Events
latest_8k.text: On May 7, 2026, the Company completed the issuance and sale of 300,000 Shares, which Shares were deposited against delivery of Depositary Receipts evidencing 3,000,000 Depositary Shares, pursuant to an Underwriting Agreement, dated April 30, 2026, among the Company, J.P. Morgan Securities LLC and the other several underwriters named therein. The sale of the Depositary Shares was made pursuant to the Company's Registration Statement on Form S-3 (File No. 333-285537), as amended. In connection with this offering, the legal opinion as to the legality of the Depositary Shares and the Series PP Preferred Stock is being filed as Exhibit 5.1 to this Current Report on Form 8-K.

company_news.sentiment_note: The API did not return a sentiment field; the labels above are a simple qualitative read based on the article titles and source context.

overall_readthrough: Q1 2026 earnings were strong: EPS +17.2% YoY, revenue +10.0% YoY, and operating margin expanded materially.
Valuation remains moderate for a large-cap bank at ~14.6x P/E and ~2.23x P/B per the snapshot.
Macro backdrop is still bank-relevant: the Fed is at 3.625% and other major central banks remain in mixed easing/holding regimes.
News flow is mixed-to-positive overall, with notable capital-markets activity and strategic/investment-banking positives offset by some post-earnings share-price weakness.
